images.depicts: gold-lit leafy tree with ~15 generic teddy-bear/woodland-creature figurines gathered below, lanterns, streamers
images.issue: CRITICAL: uses a generic unnamed woodland-creature crowd (bear/raccoon-like plush figures) instead of the program's actual named cast (Segina, Sam, Cat, Ant, Dad, Dog, Rat, Pup, Bug, Duck, Fox, Sheep, Chick, Snake, Bee, Star, Owl); none of these figures are recognizable as any established character

images.depicts: tabby cat and brown dog side by side wearing graduation caps, close-up
white fluffy sheep, green/gold snake, and gold-and-black bee together in graduation caps
golden five-point star with a sleeping/serene face beside a tawny owl with huge amber eyes
chick, snake, sheep, owl, dog, cat, duck, and bee together mid-celebration, dancing/jumping, star held aloft
images.issue: excellent full-cast-in-motion match, but only the animal cast is present — no Segina, Sam, Ant, Dad, Rat, Pup, Bug, or Fox

images.depicts: generic furry woodland creatures (same bear/mouse-like design family as celebration-scene) looking up at a glowing tree with a round silhouette at the top
images.issue: CRITICAL: same generic-creature substitution as celebration-scene.png — should show the named cast looking up at the Pattern Tree

images.depicts: potato with round glasses radiating light, surrounded by generic bespectacled rodent/squirrel-like creatures gasping
images.issue: CRITICAL: surrounding cast is generic rodent creatures, not the named cast gasping in delight — potato itself is correctly rendered and matches the 'apotheosis' moment

images.depicts: potato wearing gold crown atop a fully-leafed light-strung tree, arms raised, generic woodland creatures cheering below
images.issue: CRITICAL: cheering crowd is again the generic creature set, not the named cast — potato+crown+tree rendering itself is correct

images.depicts: peg-doll girl (Segina), tiger cat, black ant, small red-spotted bug, grey mouse/rat, brown dog, white duck, red fox, white sheep, yellow chick, green snake, bee, gold star, crowned potato atop leafy tree, open book
images.issue: PARTIAL: this is the correct named-cast image family (13 of 17 figures identifiable), but is MISSING Owl, Sam (the second peg-doll boy), Dad, and Pup entirely from the finale group shot

images.depicts: miniature model train station house labeled 'Mat Station' with lamp post and rail tracks
single small blue flag with a ring of gold stars on a pole
abstract swirling soft-serve/whipped shape with speed-blur rings around it
images.issue: mjPrompt called for 'a spinning top with speed lines' — this reads as an ice-cream/whipped-cream swirl, not a recognizable toy top; ambiguous for a child audience

images.depicts: round pie cut into 12 equal slices, one slice pulled out
striped beach umbrella over a sand bucket with shells, sunbeam

line_map.line: shun… shun… shun… The LAST sound of all!
t-i-o-n says SHUN! Action! Station! Nation! Celebration! The LAST leaf on the Tree!

line_map.line: Motion! Section! Fraction! t-i-o-n — always SHUN! A vacation! A celebration!

line_map.line: Fifty-eight weeks! Every leaf! Every light! We can read! The whole Tree is GREEN!

line_map.line: A potato?! (YES!) At LAST — potato! P-O-T-A-T-O! The king of the Tree!

line_map.line: celebration… graduation… we can read it all! Potato! (the crown!)
